briefdescription.para: The freq of the crystal in Hz.
Max VCO Operating Freq in Hz.
Min VCO Operating Freq in Hz.
Max Phase Detector Freq in Hz.
Min Phase Detector Freq in Hz.
This function initializes the IDT 8TN49N24x with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, int FIn, int FOut, u8 FreeRun)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_SetClock

briefdescription.para: This function calculates and sets the IDT 8TN49N24x device with the given clock configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

specifies if the operation mode is locked/synthesizer mode.
TRUE Synthesizer mode (Fout only)
FALSE Locked mode (Fout locked to Fin)

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE I2C write error or incorrect parameters detected.

briefdescription.para: This function displays a registerdump of the IDT 8TN49N24x device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 IICAddress, u32 InFreq, u32 OutFreq)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_I2cClk

briefdescription.para: This function setup IDT 8T49N24x clock generator either in free or locked mode.
This function setup IDT 8T49N24x clock generator to enable GPIO[3] to be used as LoL indicator.
